name: libnet-http-perl
title: libnet-http-perl
summary: module providing low-level HTTP connection client
description:
module providing low-level HTTP connection client
The Net::HTTP class is a low-level HTTP client.  An instance of the
Net::HTTP class represents a connection to an HTTP server.  The
HTTP protocol is described in RFC 2616.  The Net::HTTP class
supports HTTP/1.0 and HTTP/1.1. Net::HTTP is a sub-class of IO::Socket::INET.
You can mix its methods with reading and writing from the socket directly.
This is not necessarily a good idea, unless you know what you are doing.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnet-http-perl because module providing low-level HTTP connection client.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnet-http-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnet-http-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnet-http-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
